category_sources: official PuTTY landing page describes it as an SSH client and xterm-style terminal emulator
source_facts.description says implementation of Telnet and SSH
display_name_sources: official PuTTY landing page title and description use PuTTY
docs_sources: official PuTTY documentation page links current release documentation
official PuTTY download page links the HTML contents page for documentation
repo_sources: official PuTTY latest release page lists clone URL https://git.tartarus.org/simon/putty.git and gitweb links
tags_sources: official PuTTY landing/download pages describe SSH, Telnet, terminal, SCP, and SFTP utilities
source_facts.description and executables include putty, plink, pscp, psftp, puttygen, and pageant
